s: In 2012, Darin Downs suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.480, WHIP 1.310, SO 20, WAR 0.200.
In 2013, Darin Downs suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.840, WHIP 1.330, SO 37, WAR 0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (DET -> HOU).
In 2014, Darin Downs suited up for HOU as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.450, WHIP 1.360, SO 27, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined HOU.
